tone: friendly-professional, second-person, conversational. No exclamation marks. No emoji. Avoid marketing-speak inflation.
formality: 존댓말 (haeyo-che, 해요체). Polite but warm — neither casual 반말 nor stiff 합니다체. End sentences with -요/-에요/-ㅂ니다 mixed naturally. Use second-person 손님 / 여러분 / 당신 sparingly; prefer subject-omission where Korean would naturally drop it.

terminology.note: green fee — write closed, no space.
caddie fee — write closed. Caddie = 캐디; caddie tip = 캐디 팁.
the act of playing a round. Use 라운드 ONLY as a counter/quantity (예: 1라운드, 라운드당).
screen golf — write closed. Used as the familiar KO frame of reference for the simulator.

currency.format: Half-width Arabic digits + 바트 (Hangul), no space: 1,800바트, 550~950바트. Comma thousands separator.
currency.note: RULING: guide/explainer content spells the currency as 바트 (dominant across shipped KO guide entries — lessons, green-fee, round-cost, baggage, screen-golf). The Latin 'THB' abbreviation appears only in table column labels / preserved fragments; do NOT use it in KO prose. messages/ko.json UI copy mixes THB and 바트 per its own namespace history; leave it as-is.

conventions.ranges: ASCII tilde ~ (U+007E) between values, no spaces: 25~30kg, 550~950바트, 4~7kg.
conventions.numerals: Arabic digits only; never Korean/Sino-Korean numeral words for figures.

honesty_constraints.required_scoping: Negative claims about coach languages must be scoped to LENGOLF (e.g. 'LENGOLF에 한국인 코치나 한국어 레슨은 없지만…'), never stated city-wide about Bangkok. City-wide statements may only be POSITIVE and general (e.g. '방콕에서는 영어로 진행하는 레슨이 일반적이에요').
honesty_constraints.allowed_language_support: 예약·사전 상담은 booking.len.golf 또는 LINE @lengolf에서 한국어로 도와드립니다 (booking/consultation in Korean via LINE @lengolf; online booking via booking.len.golf). Also: on-screen simulator numbers (헤드 스피드, 발사각) help across the language barrier. Do NOT claim Korean-language lessons or Korean coaches.
honesty_constraints.linter_hint: Flag each forbidden_claims string for human REVIEW (not auto-reject) when it appears WITHOUT LENGOLF-scoped negation nearby (없지만／없습니다／없어요 within the same sentence or paragraph) AND the LINE @lengolf allowance. These are honesty rules, not lexical bans.

transliterations.note: KO transliterates the BTS station name (BTS 칫롬역) but keeps 'The Mercury Ville' in Latin ('The Mercury Ville 4층'). Keep LENGOLF, len.golf, BTS, MRT, PGA, LINE @lengolf, booking.len.golf, and Latin brand/product names (Callaway, Majesty) verbatim.

seo_norms.title_display_target: ~30 characters, front-loaded with the target query, descriptive tail after an em dash — (shipped guide titles 22–52 chars).
seo_norms.meta_note: Hook + target query in the first ~80 characters; KO meta truncates around 80 chars on mobile SERP. Shipped guide metas run ~90–160 chars.
seo_norms.front_load: Lead with the reader's query (예: 골프백 수하물 요금), not the brand.

style_notes: 해요체 (haeyo-che) as the default warm-polite register; drop into 합니다체 sparingly for emphasis or list/summary sentences.
For list intros prefer '다음과 같아요' / '다음과 같습니다' over colloquial '이래요'.
Spacing: 드라이빙 레인지 (with space); but 그린피 / 캐디피 / 티타임 / 스크린골프 / 올인클루시브 written closed.
Arabic digits + 바트/달러/kg with no space (1,800바트, 6kg).
No exclamation marks, no emoji. Subject-omission where Korean naturally drops it.
